_comment: Feature demo deck for the trace-column pet ('Kit') shipped in the kitsoki web UI: a small decorative animated inline-SVG pet docked at the bottom of .iv__trace that wanders, blinks, leaves the occasional poop, and walks over to eat a snack. Opt-in via a 🐾 toggle in the State Diagram header; pure inline SVG + CSS, zero deps. Component tools/runstatus/src/components/TracePet.vue, docked in InteractiveView.vue. meta.mode:pitch required. Scene shapes copied from pet-prd.slidey.json and slidey-128-bugfix.slidey.json.

scenes.title: Meet Kit — the trace-column pet
scenes.subtitle: A little life at the bottom of the trace, opt-in and never in the way
scenes.narration: Meet Kit: a small animated companion that lives at the bottom of the trace column — opt-in, and never in your way.

scenes.lede: A tiny companion for the long wait.
scenes.body: Watching a long agent loop is a lonely wait — rows tick by while the agent thinks, tests run, and a fix lands. Kit is a small decorative SVG pet anchored at the bottom of the trace column that idles and plays through that wait. It's a single inline-SVG component, absolutely positioned, so it adds warmth without ever displacing a trace row.
scenes.narration: Watching a long run is a lonely wait. Kit fills it with a little life — a small SVG pet at the bottom of the trace column that idles and plays while the agent works, without ever pushing a row out of the way.

scenes.title: What Kit does
scenes.narration: Kit wanders along the floor of the column, blinks, leaves the occasional poop, and now and then a snack appears and it strolls over to eat it. It lives at the bottom of the trace, you opt in with a single paw-print toggle, and it costs nothing — pure inline S-V-G and C-S-S.

cards.label: Wanders & blinks
cards.sub: bobs along the column floor, blinks now and then

cards.label: Poops & snacks
cards.sub: leaves the occasional poop; walks over to eat a snack

cards.label: Lives at the trace bottom
cards.sub: docked in .iv__trace, absolutely positioned, never displaces a row

cards.label: Opt-in 🐾 toggle
cards.sub: off by default; one paw-print toggle in the State Diagram header

cards.label: Zero weight
cards.sub: pure inline SVG + CSS keyframes — no images, no deps, no network

scenes.title: Delivered in three slices

cells: TracePet.vue — inline SVG + CSS keyframes for idle, wander, blink, poop, and snack
Docked at the bottom of .iv__trace in InteractiveView.vue, absolutely positioned over the column floor
A 🐾 toggle in the State Diagram header — off by default, persists the choice

scenes.caption: Three small slices: the component, where it lives, and how you turn it on.

scenes.body: Kit is deliberately weightless: no images, no dependencies, no network — just inline SVG and CSS keyframes. It's absolutely positioned so it can never block or shift a trace row, it's off by default, and it respects reduced-motion. A little personality, held to strict guardrails.
scenes.narration: Kit is charming but disciplined — no images, no dependencies, no network, just inline S-V-G and C-S-S. It can't block a trace row, it's off by default, and it respects reduced-motion.

scenes.lede: A little life in the trace column.
scenes.body: Flip the 🐾 toggle in the State Diagram header and Kit wakes up at the bottom of your trace — wandering, blinking, and snacking through the wait. Opt-in, weightless, and never in the way.
scenes.narration: Flip the paw-print toggle and Kit wakes up at the bottom of your trace. A little life in the trace column — opt-in, weightless, and never in the way.
